message:
refactor(dns): inject entropy source into Resolver, extract SyncDnsQueryContext

Make the DNS resolver's entropy source configurable instead of
hardcoded to OsEntropy:

- Add entropy: Arc<dyn EntropySource> field to Resolver.
- Default constructors (new, with_time_getter) initialize with
  OsEntropy.
- New with_entropy(Arc<dyn EntropySource>) builder method for
  test injection.
- Clone implementation clones the Arc.

Extract SyncDnsQueryContext struct bundling timeout, started instant,
and entropy reference. This replaces passing (timeout, started) as
separate parameters through the recursive query_records_inner_sync
call chain:
- query_records_sync creates the context and passes it down.
- query_records_inner_sync takes &SyncDnsQueryContext instead of
  (timeout, started).
- query_ip_with_nameservers_sync takes entropy parameter and creates
  its own context.

All public lookup methods (lookup_ip, lookup_mx, lookup_srv, lookup_txt)
now clone the entropy Arc and pass it to their blocking closures.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
